repo.description: ReadingBank: A Benchmark Dataset for Reading Order Detection

terms.context_snippet: ReadingBank is a benchmark dataset for reading order detection built with weak supervision from WORD documents, which contains 500K document images with a wide range of document types as well as the corresponding reading order information.
